# kSCNetworkConnectionPacketsOut

**Global Variable**

The key associated with the number of packets coming out of the network stack for any networking protocol without the PPP headers and trailers.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSCNetworkConnectionPacketsOut: String { get }
```

## Constants

- **kSCNetworkConnectionBytesIn**: The key associated with the number of bytes going up into the network stack for any networking protocol without the PPP headers and trailers.
- **kSCNetworkConnectionBytesOut**: The key associated with the number of bytes coming out of the network stack for any networking protocol without the PPP headers and trailers.
- **kSCNetworkConnectionPacketsIn**: The key associated with the number of packets going up into the network stack for any networking protocol without the PPP headers and trailers.
- **kSCNetworkConnectionErrorsIn**: The key associated with the number of errors going up into the network stack for any networking protocol without the PPP headers and trailers.
- **kSCNetworkConnectionErrorsOut**: The key associated with the number of errors coming out of the network stack for any networking protocol without the PPP headers and trailers.
